{{Infobox group
| name = Empire (The Last Horizon)
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Empire]] is in a generations-long war with the [[Lichborn]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c12">''The Engineer'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Empire]] is a group that may have the [[Rebel Queen]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33">''The Engineer'', chapter 33</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Empire]] is a political entity related to [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
